sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after second RIGHT
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

# Find the green frames (N color) in both
before_n = [n for n in before.segmentation['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
after_n = [n for n in after.segmentation['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']

print("Before RIGHT:")
for n in before_n:
    print(f"  N frame: boundary={n['boundary']} children={n['children']}")
    # Find child center
    child_id = n['children'][0] if n['children'] else None
    if child_id:
        child = next((x for x in before.segmentation['nodes'] if x['id'] == child_id), None)
        if child:
            print(f"    center: color={child['color']} boundary={child['boundary']}")

print("After RIGHT:")
for n in after_n:
    print(f"  N frame: boundary={n['boundary']} children={n['children']}")
    child_id = n['children'][0] if n['children'] else None
    if child_id:
        child = next((x for x in after.segmentation['nodes'] if x['id'] == child_id), None)
        if child:
            print(f"    center: color={child['color']} boundary={child['boundary']}")

# Also check white squares and other objects
print("\nWhite squares (w, pixels=9):")
after_w = [n for n in after.segmentation['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'w' and n['pixels'] == 9]
for n in after_w:
    print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check the charcoal targets
print("\nCharcoal frames (c, pixels=16):")
after_c = [n for n in after.segmentation['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 16]
for n in after_c:
    print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']} children={n['children']}")
</parameter>
